components.storyboardImageCheck.title: Title

hello.welcomeDesc: AI-driven comic creation workflow platform, let us spend a minute to complete the initial configuration.
hello.configModelDesc: First, you need to add at least one AI model service provider (such as OpenAI, Claude, etc.) in the settings and fill in the corresponding API Key.
hello.configModelTip: Clicking the button below will open the "Model Service" tab of the settings page. After adding the supplier, return here to continue.
hello.configAgentDesc: Next, assign models to each functional module in the Agent configuration so that the system knows which model to call to complete the task.
hello.configAgentTip: Clicking the button below will open the "Agent Configuration" tab of the settings page. Return here after assigning models to each function.
hello.finishDesc:
The configuration is complete and now you can start using all the features. 
If you need to adjust it, you can modify it in the settings at any time.
hello.qrcodeLabel: Join the WeChat communication group to get more help:
hello.githubLabel: If you find it useful, please give us a ⭐ Star!
